default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and discuss Looker dashboard updates and data visualization tasks for various clients.](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple client-specific Looker dashboard updates required, ranging from minor tweaks to complex data integrations](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [New data source integration needed for Web Stacks client, involving CSV import and custom visualizations](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Outreach Lukas project requires extensive data visualization from a complex Google Sheet, including various charts and tables](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining data integrity while creating flexible, updateable dashboards for clients](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

## Topics

### Abnormal (Mariana) Dashboard Update

  - [Client using report incorrectly; focus on clicks, impressions, CTR, and position](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Potential solution: Change data source from GFO to GSC for first page](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Update chart to display clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Modify table to show clicks, impressions, CTR, and position](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

### Bar Chart Display Limitation Fix

  - [Issue: Some charts only show 7-8 bars](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Solution: Adjust 'Bars' setting in Style tab to 100-500 for all relevant charts across client dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Implementation: Change settings in background without notifying clients](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)

### Web Stacks Data Visualization

  - [New data source: CSV file with lead information (name, email, creation date, page first seen)](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Jessalyn to update sheet with "GX lead" column (yes/no)](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Visualization requirements:](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
      - [Number of leads month-on-month, cohorted by GX or non-GX URL](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Group data by week or month](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [Challenges in date grouping to be addressed in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Limes Dashboard Update

  - [Add "count of landing page" column to cohorts tab](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Include in first and second tables of the cohorts tab](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

### Time Period Grouping Feature

  - [New filter added for weekly, monthly, or quarterly data grouping](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Custom parameter and field created for this feature](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Consider deploying to all dashboards if well-received](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Outreach Lukas Dashboard Additions

1.  Add session duration to overall tab data
2.  Create chart showing sessions vs. views in overall tab
3.  Integrate and visualize complex Google Sheet data:
      - [Double bar graph: Count of leads and meetings booked per day](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [Raw data table (excluding final column)](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Table of initial landing pages with count](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Table of conversion landing pages with count](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [Table of leads and meetings booked per campaign](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
      - [Pie charts for UTM source, medium, and campaign distributions](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement Abnormal dashboard updates and await client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Apply bar chart display fix across all relevant client dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Develop Web Stacks data visualization, focusing on proper date grouping](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Update Limes dashboard with new landing page count column](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Create comprehensive Outreach Lukas dashboard with all specified charts and tables](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Prepare video tutorial for clients on updating data sources in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Complete tasks by early Friday and seek guidance if needed](https://fathom.video/share/W6pzFCPkWyffaqNTGGia4v_-xfx2_YXD?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
